---
title: "Resume"
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          <style>
          .quarto-title {
            display: none;
          }
          </style>
---

<div style="text-align: center; margin: 20px 0;">
  <a href="resume/cv_mg.pdf" class="btn btn-custom" download>
    <i class="fa fa-download"></i> Download resume (pdf)
  </a>
</div>


  <iframe 
    src="resume/index.html" 
    width="100%"
    height="1200px" 
    style="background: transparent;">
  </iframe>
